import heapq

def connect_ropes_min_cost(ropes):
    if not ropes or len(ropes) <= 1:
        return 0

    heapq.heapify(ropes)
    total_cost = 0

    while len(ropes) > 1:
        first = heapq.heappop(ropes)
        second = heapq.heappop(ropes)
        
        current_cost = first + second
        total_cost += current_cost
        
        heapq.heappush(ropes, current_cost)
        
    return total_cost
prompt: Connect n ropes with minimum cost yaz.
